---
title: 'Topic: white  You Dr. Briar, like this experiment,...'
date: '2014-12-31T12:24:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '2712989919095344808'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

Topic: white<br /><br><br /><br>You Dr. Briar, like this experiment, were always temporary and expendable.
